title: France finance minister says Hormuz must open, G7 ready to mitigate war fallout
summary_full: French President Emmanuel Macron and UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer are hosting talks in Paris on Friday on navigation through the Strait of Hormuz once there is a ceasefire
summary_public: French President Emmanuel Macron and UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer are hosting talks in Paris on Friday on navigation through the Strait of Hormuz once there is a ceasefire
